blended.narrative: Gore Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 497 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total.

Tuesday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 46°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 4" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
